scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/content && npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/web && npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/admin
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/content && npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/web
scripts.build:admin: npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/content && npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/content && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @interesting-languages/content && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
